name: Dill Casserole Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the yeast and 2 tablespoons of sugar into the warm water. Let stand until foamy. Warm the cottage cheese until lukewarm.
2. Combine the flour, remaining sugar, onion, dill, salt, and baking soda in a large bowl. Add the egg, butter, and cottage cheese mixture. Stir to form a soft dough (or mix in a food processor). Cover and let rise in a warm spot until doubled, about 1 hour.
3. Gently fold the dough. Transfer to a greased 1 1/2- to 2-quart casserole. Cover and let rise again until doubled, about 40 minutes.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F. Bake bread until well browned, 40 to 45 minutes. Let cool in the pan for 5 minutes; loosen from the sides of the casserole and invert onto a wire rack. Serve warm or at room temperature.
